sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5746" key="a)mfi/geios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίγειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5746.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with land on both sides,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θάλασσα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl></cit>, Suid.S.v. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πορθμός.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
